name: RoamQuest Project Skills
description: Efficient development skills for RoamQuest Flutter app

skills.name: Run RoamQuest on iOS Simulator
skills.description: Launch the iOS simulator and run the RoamQuest app in debug mode
skills.command: xcrun simctl boot '04EECB16-13C4-42E0-8E95-452982683A5A' 2>/dev/null || true && flutter run

skills.name: Hot Reload Flutter App
skills.description: Trigger hot reload on the running Flutter app without rebuilding

skills.name: Hot Restart Flutter App
skills.description: Trigger hot restart on the running Flutter app to reset state

skills.name: Build iOS App
skills.description: Clean build the iOS app using Flutter

skills.name: Run Flutter Tests
skills.description: Run Flutter tests for the RoamQuest project

skills.name: Analyze Code
skills.description: Run static analysis on Flutter code to find issues

skills.name: Format Code
skills.description: Format all Dart files using dart format

skills.name: Auto-fix Code Issues
skills.description: Run dart fix to automatically fix code issues

skills.name: Open Main Entry File
skills.description: Open the main.dart file in the IDE

skills.name: Open Home Page
skills.description: Open the home page file in the IDE

skills.name: Find Files by Pattern
skills.description: Search for files matching a pattern (glob)

skills.name: Grep Search in Code
skills.description: Search for text/pattern in code files

arguments.name: pattern
arguments.description: Text or regex pattern to search for (e.g., is_active, City)

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Directory path to search in (default: lib/)

skills.name: Show Project Structure
skills.description: Display the directory structure of the project
skills.command: tree -L -3 lib/ || find lib -type d | head -30

skills.name: Check Supabase Connection
skills.description: Verify Supabase connection status and check tables

skills.name: Query Cities Table
skills.description: Query the cities table from Supabase

skills.name: Query Checklists Table
skills.description: Query the checklists table from Supabase

skills.name: Run SQL Script
skills.description: Execute SQL script on Supabase database

skills.name: Test Location Service
skills.description: Test the location service functionality with mock data

skills.name: Test AI Service
skills.description: Test the AI service and checklist generation

skills.name: Open Documentation
skills.description: Open project documentation files

skills.name: Install Flutter Dependencies
skills.description: Get Flutter packages and install dependencies

skills.name: Upgrade Flutter Dependencies
skills.description: Update Flutter dependencies to their latest compatible versions

skills.name: Clean Build Cache
skills.description: Clean Flutter build cache and regenerate files

skills.name: Flutter Doctor
skills.description: Check Flutter environment for issues and status
